title: Comte and Basque Galette
description: A French-inspired vegetarian galette filled with the creamy flavors of Comte cheese and the sweetness of caramelized Basque cherries.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Spread the softened Comte cheese evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Arrange the caramelized Basque cherries on top of the cheese.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Fold the pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the top of the galette with a little water and sprinkle with salt.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Drizzle with indulgent honey before serving.
